daily_brief.headline: Risk-off: 49% breadth, tighten stops; macro neutral

highlights.title: US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slide up to 0.7% as oil rally dents sentiment; Brent reclaims $100
IEX Q4 Results: Net profit rises 11% YoY to ₹130 crore; board declares ₹2 final dividend
India’s private sector gains momentum in April on manufacturing strength
Union Bank of India Q4 Results: Net profit jumps 6.6% YoY to ₹5,316 crore; ₹5 dividend declared
HSBC downgrades India to 'underweight' as oil clouds outlook
US farmers reel from spiralling prices due to Iran war

daily_brief.key_insight: Risk-off regime with 49% breadth and median momentum -0.7%. Raise cash, honour stops, resist bottom-fishing until breadth recovers above 55%. conviction_board.name: Nestle India
conviction_board.narrative: NESTLEIND's momentum is running hot with RSI at 89. The question is whether this leg has more room or needs a breather. There's no discernible trend. The stock is range-bound and waiting for direction. Market headwinds are real — 49% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. FMCG is lagging the broader tape (score 20) — an extra headwind. Watch ₹1,368 — a break below opens further downside. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish.
